title: Bethesda confirms remasters of Fallout 3 and New Vegas and announces that Fallout 5 is in pre-production
summary: The company also details plans for The Elder Scrolls 6 and assures its commitment to the Fallout saga, including new expansions for Fallout 76.

title: Joe Ziegler, director of Marathon, leaves Bungie just four months after the game's launch
summary: The executive leaves to take on new projects, at a time of uncertainty for the studio.

title: Doom director Hugo Martin denies that id Software has been decimated by Xbox's cuts
summary: Martin assures that the Doom team remains intact and that what matters is that the games are good.

title: Bethesda promises new content for Starfield in 2027 and reiterates that it will remain important for the studio
summary: The development team assures that the space game will receive continued support and new content in the coming years.

title: Todd Howard denies holding a grudge against Obsidian and clarifies that it is too early to talk about exclusivity for The Elder Scrolls 6 and Fallout 5
summary: The director of Bethesda responds to rumors about the rivalry with Obsidian and the possible exclusivities of their upcoming releases.

title: Studio ZA/UM lays off employees two months after launching Zero Parades, citing poor commercial performance
summary: The Disco Elysium studio confirms that the game's sales were not enough to maintain the current size of the studio.

title: GTA 6 pre-orders generate $260 million in its first week, according to Newzoo
summary: An analyst firm corrects previous figures and rates the pre-order campaign as the strongest ever recorded, although other sources point out that the initial data was incorrect.

title: Todd Howard assures that The Elder Scrolls 6 remains the main development focus of Bethesda
summary: Following the cuts at Xbox, the studio reaffirms that the game is progressing and that they are happy with the result they see every day.

title: Blizzard reverses the most controversial changes of Diablo 4 season 14 with a new patch
summary: The company acknowledges that 'not all ideas turn out as expected' and reverses almost everything that players had criticized.

title: Battlefield 6 revives a classic 20-year-old mode with a Top Gun crossover in its season 4
summary: The Carrier Assault mode evolves and the collaboration with Top Gun will bring content beyond cosmetic appearances.

title: Stardew Valley and Magic: The Gathering launch a collaborative 'Secret Lair' collection that is sure to sell out
summary: Fans of the farming simulator and the collectible card game will be able to get exclusive themed cards from the collaboration.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 developer clarifies that the Gunny assistant is not a chatbot, but they use AI in other aspects
summary: The studio insists that Gunny is not a conversational artificial intelligence, although it acknowledges that they use AI in other game functions.

title: Creator of Backrooms denounces that A24 is trying to apply copyright over art it does not own
summary: Kane Parsons defends an artist affected by A24's copyright claims over Backrooms content.

title: Deborah Ann Woll, actress of God of War's Laufey, assures that she is not affected by trolls' criticism
summary: The performer of the God of War character says she feels 'totally calm' about the hatred received on social media.

title: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen affirms that physical games are 'totally irrelevant' for the business
summary: The top executive of the store chain declares that the physical format no longer matters in the company's strategy.

title: Christopher Nolan's new film, The Odyssey, sparks controversy over its flashes and plot
summary: Recent articles analyze the identity of the Sea Peoples, explain the end of the epic, and warn of scenes that could trigger epileptic seizures.

title: Unions accuse Microsoft of illegal layoffs at Xbox as rumors of cancellations and changes emerge
summary: Complaints are filed for unfair labor practices and speculation arises about a deep restructuring in Microsoft's gaming division.

title: The remake of Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic is still in development and targets a 2028 release
summary: Saber Interactive confirms that the project is alive and plans to release it in a few years, although there is no official date yet.

title: The acquisition of EA by Saudi Arabia is about to receive the green light from the European Union
summary: The deal for the Saudi fund to take control of Electronic Arts would overcome the last communitarian regulatory obstacle.

title: God of War live-action series suffers a major setback: Kratos actor is injured and must be replaced
summary: Filming is affected by the lead actor's injury, which forces the search for a new performer for the main role.
